justification: All pass criteria met: PM/Legal contradiction explicitly identified and escalated (escalation #1), clock-start ambiguity identified (assumption #3 and edge case #2), wrong-address exception from Finance noted (BR-7), auto-refund vs 3-day processing conflict noted (escalation #2 and edge case #10), 9 rules extracted with classifications, 3 formal escalations, confidence.level=40 which is <=50.

observations.text: PM/Legal guarantee vs best-effort contradiction is the lead escalation with clear options and recommendation
Clock-start ambiguity addressed in assumptions ('2-hour window starts at order placement, not at driver pickup') and edge case about 14m59s pickup
Wrong-address refund exception captured as BR-7 with testable assertion
Auto-refund vs 3-business-day processing conflict explicitly called out in escalation #2 with three resolution options
9 business rules extracted, exceeding the minimum of 5, all with invariant classifications and justifications
3 formal escalations covering contradiction, refund ambiguity, and missing operational context
Confidence at 40 appropriately reflects the high degree of contradiction and ambiguity
Excellent edge cases covering boundary conditions, cascading failures, and temporal ambiguities
Ubiquitous language includes 'Goodwill Refund' which encodes Legal's position without silently resolving the contradiction
BR-3 pickup within 15 minutes classified as invariant=false, while rubric expected invariant=true as an express SLA requirement — reasonable justification provided but differs from expected
BR-4 driver rating threshold classified as invariant=false, while rubric expected invariant=true as a quality gate — again reasonable but differs from expected

grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'ambiguity', 'missing_context'
